sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: O REILLY AUTOMOTIVE INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 3억 1,900만 달러 증가하여 44억 1,000만 달러를 기록했으며, 전년 동기 41억 달러 대비 8% 성장했다.
4분기 동일매장 매출은 5.6% 증가했고, 연간으로는 4.7% 성장하며 33년 연속 동일매장 성장 기록을 이어갔다.
4분기 희석 EPS는 13% 증가하여 주당 0.71달러를 기록했으며, 연간 EPS는 10% 증가하여 주당 2.97달러를 달성했다.

riskChanges.text: 직원 헬스케어 및 산재 비용 인플레이션으로 판관비가 예상을 초과했으며, 분기 내내 비용 압력이 지속됐다.

businessChanges.text: 2025년 6월 10일 15:1 주식 분할을 실시했으며, 당기 및 비교 기간의 주당 데이터가 이에 맞게 소급 조정됐다.
2025년 연간 영업활동 현금흐름은 28억 달러를 기록하며 강건한 현금 창출 능력을 유지했다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 매출총이익은 9% 증가하여 22억 9,000만 달러(매출 대비 51.8%)를 기록했으며, 전년 21억 달러(51.3%) 대비 마진이 소폭 개선됐다.
영업이익은 8억 2,900만 달러로 전년 7억 3,900만 달러(매출 대비 18.0%) 대비 증가했다.
4분기 순이익은 5,400만 달러 증가하여 6억 500만 달러(매출 대비 13.7%)를 기록했으며, 전년 5억 5,100만 달러 대비 10% 증가했다.

watchItems.text: 헬스케어 및 산재 비용 인플레이션이 판관비 예상치를 초과하고 있어 비용 관리 개선 여부가 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.
15:1 주식 분할 이후 유통주식수가 848백만주 수준으로 주주환원 정책과 자사주 매입 속도를 지속 추적할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 orly-20260204xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ​ O’REILLY AUTOMOTIVE, INC. REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL-YEAR 2025 RESULTS ​ ● Fourth quarter comparable store sales growth of 5.6%, full-year increase of 4.7% ● 13% increase in fourth quarter diluted earnings per share to $0.71, full-year increase of 10% to $2.97 ● $2.8 billion net cash provided by operating activities in 2025 ​ Springfield, MO, February 4, 2026 – O’Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O’Reilly”) ( Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, today announced record revenue and earnings for its fourth quarter and full-year ended December 31, 2025. The results represent 33 consecutive years of comparable store sales growth and record revenue and operating income for O’Reilly since becoming a public company in April of 1993. ​ 4 th Quarter Financial Results  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $0.71 = 0.71달러; $2.97 = 2.97달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러.

Beckham, O’Reilly’s CEO, commented, “I would like to thank our over 93,000 Team Members for their tremendous hard work and commitment while delivering a strong finish to 2025. Our Team continues to drive share gains on both sides of our business through excellent customer service and industry-leading parts availability, resulting in our fourth quarter comparable store sales growth of 5.6%. Our top-line results, coupled with strong gross margin performance, drove a 12% increase in operating profit dollars and a 13% increase in diluted earnings per share for the fourth quarter. We are pleased with our Team’s ability to capitalize on the investments we are making in our business and manage operating costs to provide exceptional customer service and capture market share; however, SG&A expenses again exceeded our expectations in the fourth quarter due to pressure from heightened inflation  Normalized numeric aliases: 93,000 million = 930억 달러.

in team member health care and casualty claim costs. We remain intensely focused on managing expenses and mitigating these cost pressures but will always prioritize delivering the service levels and parts availability in our stores that are critical to winning share and driving industry-leading results.” ​ Sales for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, increased $319 million, or 8%, to $4.41 billion from $4.10 billion for the same period one year ago. Gross profit for the fourth quarter increased 9% to $2.29 billion (or 51.8% of sales) from $2.10 billion (or 51.3% of sales) for the same period one year ago. Selling,  Normalized numeric aliases: $319 million = 3억 1,900만 달러; $4.41 billion = 44억 1,000만 달러; $4.10 billion = 41억 달러; $2.29 billion = 22억 9,000만 달러; $2.10 billion = 21억 달러; $1.46 billion = 14억 6,000만 달러; $1.36 billion = 13억 6,000만 달러; $829 million = 8억 2,900만 달러; $4.41 = 4.41달러; $1.36 = 1.36달러; $4.10 = 4.10달러; $2.29 = 2.29달러; $2.10 = 2.10달러; $1.46 = 1.46달러; $829 = 829달러.

of sales) from $739 million (or 18.0% of sales) for the same period one year ago. ​ Net income for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025, increased $54 million, or 10%, to $605 million (or 13.7% of sales) from $551 million (or 13.5% of sales) for the same period one year ago. Diluted earnings per common share for the fourth quarter increased 13% to $0.71 on 848 million shares versus $0.63 on 870 million shares for the same period one year ago. The Company completed a 15-for-1 forward stock split on June 10, 2025, and accordingly all share and per share data in current and comparable periods have been adjusted to reflect the split. ​ Full-Year Financial Results Mr. Beckham concluded, “Thanks to our Team’s  Normalized numeric aliases: $739 million = 7억 3,900만 달러; $54 million = 5,400만 달러; $605 million = 6억 500만 달러; $551 million = 5억 5,100만 달러; 848 million = 8억 4,800만 달러; 870 million = 8억 7,000만 달러; $739 = 739달러; $54 = 54달러; $551 = 551달러; $605 = 605달러; $0.71 = 0.71달러; $0.63 = 0.63달러.
